title: -Slightly- changed Experience
description: It -slightly- changes the Minecraft game experience.
body:
![ScE banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5ed50f4915ee9a58e90b6d4cd356c2d0e5c0fe3.png)

#### **This modpack does not want to change the Minecraft game experience too much and keep the basic core.**
---
### **This Modpack includes:**
- many new biomes with new blocks and wood types
- many new building Blocks and variants for existing ones
- many revised and a few new structures
- an extended Nether Dimension with new biomes and mobs
- a completely reworked End Dimension
- many quality improvements in all corners
---
